feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The cute bookworm secret
entry.summary:
Author: Heartbeat_in_japanese

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,185Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 0

Summary: Jason walks down the snowy streets of Gotham, a bag full of books in one hand and the other stuck warmly in the pockets of his bomber jacket. Your apartment isn’t far from where he parked his bike, but enough snow falls for it to lie on his hair, adding some more white strands to the black ones.

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: chlo_caineandabel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,282Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 13

Summary: At what point does a stranger become your friend? When you first talk to them? When you share your secrets with them? And when they drift away, do they once again become a stranger even while knowing your deepest secrets? You were siting alone in the park with seventeen minutes left till midnight. Seventeen minutes left of your birthday. A slightly stale cupcake you received from the bakery that closed ten minutes ago sits beside you on the bench. The moon rolls about in the sky as it slowly takes its place in the dark canvas of the sky. Out of the silence of the night, you hear someone's voice. "What brings you out here so late at night?"

entry.title: Regrets do die hard
entry.summary:
Author: PlsGiveMeBFnamjoonChuseyo

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,576Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Soulmates do exist. And when they do find one another they experience severe head ache and witness eachothers memories and each others initials appear on their wrists. He never did want to find his soulmate. But he did. And.. maybe deep down he always wanted to find his soulmate. So when he did.. why did she run away? (1st part of the story is of Jason when he was Robin, 17-years-old. No sexual implications, obviously)(2nd part of the story is after jason resurrects. There will be more plot in this part!! And maybe smut idk)

entry.title: As If It Were Meant To Be
entry.summary:
Author: ghostiequill

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,913Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: After a humiliating day at your dead-end charity job, the last thing you expect is a knock at your door telling you you're royalty The second to last thing? Being told you're to be married to the infamous prince, Jason Todd. He's a problem, you're the last resort solution Neither of you asked for this, but you might be the only ones who are able to understand each other.

entry.title: MISSION: FLUSTER JASON TODD
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,548Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: summary: Three times you successfully fluster Jason and the one time he turns it on you.pairing: Jason Todd x fem!readerwarnings: reader is considered shorter than jason (he is 6'4), very suggestive so MDNI. reader has hair.a/n: not really happy with this, but If I don't post it now, I will never post it. entry.title: OMNISCIENT
entry.summary:
Author: jennysketchup

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,042Chapters: 9/45Kudos: 99

Summary: Death and Destiny are star-crossed lovers; they're bound for eternity but are subject to Fate and her imposing presence. You were once an admirer of Fate; the idea of an inescapable future buried a sense of security within you. That was until fate decided it had other plans for you. Gosh... you hate being OMNISCIENT.

entry.summary:

entry.title: The Art of Loving
entry.summary:
Author: flourishedpeony

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,448Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 21

Summary: The space between anxiety and peace has always felt out of reach to the owner of Margins & Pages. But when Jason Todd—vigilante, bookworm, and the most patient man you’ve ever met—starts leaving notes in the margins of your books, something changes—you begin to learn the art of loving, Or, different snapshots of the readers’ and Jason’s relationship throughout time.

entry.title: The Odd Tea Shop in Crime Alley
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,930Chapters: 4/25Kudos: 115

Summary: Across the street from Jason’s apartment in Park Row, a budding sign of hope caught his eye. A simple signage: Opening Soon! Tea Brews and Books.Only, he almost fistfights the snarky tea shop owner at a book sale. Then, rescues her from a mugger or three as Red Hood.Uncoincidentally, his family gets interested in the tea shop and plagues Jason with their existence both mask-on and mask-off. Coincidentally, said tea shop owner has the biggest crush on Red Hood. Now, how the hell was Jason supposed to compete with himself?

entry.summary:
Author: liasnotepad

Summary: Ice skating was the only thing that made you feel like you were in control of your own life. You had just taken a break to drink a cup of water when your friend, Dick, called you.– Can you teach my brother, Jason, how to skate?

entry.title: It's Raining Red Hood's
entry.summary:
Author: CloakedAlias

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,326Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 17

Summary: He glares at you for a second, before huffing confidently and moving again. He does manage to stand this time, gripping the worn metal railing tightly the whole way up. When he turns back around to face you, there's an air of foolish confidence around him as he cocks his head to the side and chuckles, letting go of the railing.   "See? I'm fine. I don't need some civilians help with—"   His dramatic, lone-wolf speech is cut short by a dizzy spell, and he tumbles forward enough that you have to reach out and grab his arms to steady him again.

entry.title: Baby bump
entry.summary:
Author: Kandyscorner

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,361Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 581

Summary: requested on tumblr:okay so the reader finding out she’s pregnant with Jason’s baby but doesn’t want to tell him because she’s scared of his reaction and tries to leave without telling him but he finds out anyway? (could it be angst to fluff and include the batfamily?) More has been added. Girl Dad! Jason Todd to follow.

entry.title: En Memoria
entry.summary:
Author: serpentinez

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,441Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Oh buen Jesús, que durante toda tu vida te compadeciste de los dolores ajenos, mira con misericordia las almas de nuestros seres queridos que están en el Purgatorio. Oh Jesús, que amaste a los tuyos con gran predilección, escucha la súplica que te hacemos, y por tu misericordia concede a aquellos que Tú te has llevado de nuestro hogar el gozar del eterno descanso en el seno de tu infinito amor. Amén
